title: 123 Mission Street - Wikipedia
content: # 123 Mission Street. | 123 Mission Street is located in San Francisco 123 Mission Street  Location within San Francisco | |. | Location | 123 Mission Street San Francisco, California |. 123 Mission Street is located in San Francisco. **123 Mission Street**, sometimes referenced as the **Pacific Gas & Electric Building**, is a 124 m (407 ft) 29 floor skyscraper in the SOMA neighborhood of San Francisco, California, completed in 1986.
